meta.title: COH3 Explorer - Factions, Units & Buildings
meta.description: Explore Company of Heroes 3 factions, units, buildings, and battlegroups. Detailed stats, costs, and damage information for all game content.

explorer.title: Company of Heroes 3 Factions Explorer
explorer.subtitle: Explore all the units, buildings and battlegroups in the game.

meta.title: {{faction}} - COH3 Explorer
meta.description: Explore {{faction}} faction in Company of Heroes 3. View units, buildings, battlegroups, and detailed statistics for {{faction}} army.

unitPage.weaponNote: The effective accuracy is impacted by several factors like target size or armor of the receiving unit as well as accuracy or penetration of the attacking one.
unitPage.importantNote: Important Note: This section displays all the units available in-game, including campaign-only.

weaponCard.accuracyTooltip: Chance to guarantee a hit, if it fails, scatter instead. Multiplied by target's "target size".
weaponCard.arcTooltip: The weapon's horizontal firing arc before the unit must turn, reposition or set up again
weaponCard.burstDurationTooltip: Average time spent firing one burst
weaponCard.traverseSpeedTooltip: How quickly the weapon can move side to side
weaponCard.setupTooltip: Time the unit needs to set up before it can shoot
weaponCard.teardownTooltip: Time the unit needs to tear down before it can move
weaponCard.penetrationTooltip: Chance to do damage is penetration divided by armour
weaponCard.scatterTooltip: Width × Length, area scattered shots can land in.
weaponCard.damageSpreadTooltip: Width × Length, damage is distributed to models in this area around the target.
weaponCard.deflectionDamageTooltip: Damage done after a failed penetration
weaponCard.aoeSizeTooltip: Width × Length of the rectangular damage area behind the target
weaponCard.aoeFalloffTooltip: Damage and suppression by distance from the impact point. Can damage up to {{aoeCap}} members per squad. -1 is uncapped.
weaponCard.onTheMoveTooltip: Penalties for when the unit is moving
weaponCard.onTheMoveAccuracyTooltip: Modifies accuracy by the given value
weaponCard.onTheMoveBurstTooltip: Modifies burst duration by the given value
weaponCard.onTheMoveCooldownTooltip: Modifies weapon cooldown by the given value. Cooldown is one part of the full refire cycle.
weaponCard.targetModifiersTooltip: Multiple modifiers can apply on 1 target
weaponCard.coverModifiersTooltip: When attacking against a unit inside cover
weaponCard.suppressionPerSecondTooltip: Averaged sustained suppression applied per second before recovery and resistance. Over 20 is suppressed.
weaponCard.suppressionRadiusTooltip: Radius around the target units will receive suppression, only applies to units within the arc and in range
weaponCard.incrementalTargetRadiusTooltip: Radius around the target the game will consider for Inc. Accuracy
weaponCard.incrementalTargetAccuracyTooltip: Each model in the Incremental Target Radius around the target will apply this accuracy modifier, exponential
weaponCard.timeBetweenShotsMagTooltip: Average time between shots, excluding reload cycles.
weaponCard.reloadCycleTooltip: Average time between firing when the model has to reload
weaponCard.scatterAngleTooltip: Modifies the width of the scatter area
weaponCard.scatterDistanceTooltip: Modifies the length of the scatter area up to {{scatterDistanceMax}}m, also affects offset up to {{scatterOffsetMax}}m
weaponCard.aimTimeWithWindUpTooltip: Time between finishing any ready animations and actually shooting
weaponCard.scatterOffsetTooltip: Scatter is centered this far behind the target
weaponCard.reloadFrequencyTooltip: After this many shots/bursts, the weapon will go through a reload cycle
weaponCard.projectileTravelTimeTooltip: Time between shooting and projectile impact, with no obstacles in the way
weaponCard.projectileAvoidanceArcMaxTooltip: Maximum angle the weapon may use to clear obstacles. Without obstacles it fires at {{nonCollideMinAngle}}°.

meta.title: COH3 DPS Calculator
meta.description: Calculate damage per second (DPS) for all Company of Heroes 3 units. Compare weapons, analyze cover effects, and optimize squad combinations with our advanced DPS calculator.

meta.title: COH3 DPS Compare Tool
meta.description: Compare damage per second (DPS) of up to 5 attacking units against a single target in Company of Heroes 3. Analyze unit effectiveness and optimize your army composition.
